reason: All FR-10 acceptance criteria are fully met. ApiResponse[T] contains success/data/error/error_code fields with correct Optional types and defaults. PaginatedResponse[T] properly inherits ApiResponse[T] and adds total/page/limit fields plus has_next as a computed_field derived from page*limit<total. ErrorCode enum defines all five required codes: AUTH_INVALID_SIGNATURE, RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED, KNOWLEDGE_NOT_FOUND, VALIDATION_ERROR, INTERNAL_ERROR. Tests cover success path, error path, defaults, and generic typing. Implementation uses Pydantic BaseModel with Generic[T] correctly.
